_meta.description: SHA-256 manifest for skills/*.md. Verified by sdk/utils/sha256.py before any skill is loaded.
_meta.note: All hashes are PENDING — update with actual values after skill files are written. Run: python -c "import hashlib, json, pathlib; m=json.load(open('skills/manifest.json')); [m.update({n: hashlib.sha256(pathlib.Path(f'skills/{n}.md').read_bytes()).hexdigest()}) for n in list(m.keys()) if not n.startswith('_')]; json.dump(m, open('skills/manifest.json','w'), indent=2)"
